title: Mexican Ravioli Fiesta
description: A twist on traditional pasta, these Mexican ravioli are filled with spicy beef and served in a rich tomato sauce.

ingredients.name: Teque (or beef) filling
ingredients.notes: ground beef, onion, garlic, cumin, chili powder

instructions: Cook the ravioli according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, cook the Teque filling over medium-high heat, breaking up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the cumin, chili powder, salt, and black pepper to the filling and stir to combine.
Add the tomato sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked ravioli to the skillet and toss to coat with the sauce.
Top with crispy onion and cilantro, if desired.
Serve hot, garnished with additional cilantro and onion if desired.
